### What does this pack do?

Bananafault aims to make the game look and feel better, and give you an easier and more enjoyable minecraft experience

Some notable features include: 
- dark gui & options background
- redstone utility textures
- custom health and hunger bar
- vanilla looking animated textures
- unobtrusive enchantment glint & particles
- pvp essentials (low fire, low shield, small totem pop and model)
- text and subtitle tweaks
- better font
- mod support for many mods like appleskin
- and much more...
